notes: New station opened March 16, 2009, replacing the old 1905 loop station that could not accommodate full-length trains. Built ADA-accessible from day one with $530 million in federal 9/11 recovery funding. Severely damaged by Hurricane Sandy on October 29, 2012; rebuilt and reopened June 27, 2017. The 2009 date is used as the upgrade year since that is when the station first became accessible.
